system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet_sosanhgia","body":"CREATE PROC TR_DONDATHANG_CHITIET_SOSANHGIA(@nhom nvarchar(max))
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.mancc, A.tenncc, A.ngaydat, A.chitiet, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt, A.nhom, A.dongia
	INTO #DONDATHANG
	FROM (
	SELECT A.mancc, A.tenncc, A.ngaydat, 
		B.chitiet, C.mota, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.nhom, B.dongia,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.mancc,chitiet,FORMAT(ngaydat, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY ngaydat DESC) AS rn
	FROM tr_dondathang A
	INNER JOIN tr_dondathang_chitiet B ON A.maddh = B.maddh
	INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.chitiet = C.mavt
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.trangthai <> -1 AND A.ngaydat IS NOT NULL
		AND YEAR(A.ngaydat) >= 2020
		AND C.nhom IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@nhom, ','))
	) A
	WHERE rn = 1


	SELECT A.mancc, A.tenncc, A.chitiet, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt, A.nhom,
		nam = YEAR(A.ngaydat),
		T1 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 1 THEN dongia END),
		T2 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 2 THEN dongia END),
		T3 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 3 THEN dongia END),
		T4 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 4 THEN dongia END),
		T5 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 5 THEN dongia END),
		T6 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 6 THEN dongia END),
		T7 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 7 THEN dongia END),
		T8 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 8 THEN dongia END),
		T9 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 9 THEN dongia END),
		T10 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 10 THEN dongia END),
		T11 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 11 THEN dongia END),
		T12 = MAX(CASE WHEN MONTH(ngaydat) = 12 THEN dongia END)
	FROM #DONDATHANG A
	GROUP BY A.mancc, A.tenncc, A.chitiet, A.mota, A.quycach, A.mausac, A.dvt, A.nhom, YEAR(A.ngaydat)
	ORDER BY A.chitiet, YEAR(A.ngaydat), A.mancc

	DROP TABLE #DONDATHANG
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
